surface_strategies.inputs: bg-[#0A0C10] border border-[#2A2E39] focus:border-[#4E9BE8] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#4E9BE8]

dashboard.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-[#2A2E39] bg-[#0A0C10] flex flex-col h-screen fixed
dashboard.tabs: Shadcn Tabs, customized with Coral active state indicator border-b-2
dashboard.pipeline_card: bg-[#12151C] p-4 rounded-xl border border-white/5 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-[#2A2E39] transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer

interactions.hover: All interactive elements must have clear hover states (color shift or slight transform)
interactions.animation: Framer motion for staggered list reveals on dashboard and fade-up on landing page sections

hero_glow.placement: Absolute positioned behind landing page hero, opacity 20%, blur-3xl, mix-blend-screen

features_abstract.placement: Background for How it Works or Features section

recruiter_problem.placement: Problem section image demonstrating the hiring process

dashboard_concept.placement: Features section visual or Daily Digest conceptual image

iconography.instructions: Use Phosphor icons. Duotone weight matches the dual-color brand identity.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure #F1F3F5 text against #0A0C10 meets APCA guidelines. Do not use pure gray; use slate tinted with blue for secondary text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='waitlist-submit-button', data-testid='add-candidate-button', data-testid='follow-up-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup standard React + Vite + Tailwind + Shadcn env.
2. Install required fonts: Sora (Google Fonts for headings), DM Sans (Google Fonts for body). Add `@phosphor-icons/react`.
3. Apply colors from this JSON to tailwind.config.js.
4. Build Landing Page with Waitlist form.
6. Build Dashboard Pipeline View with Tabs (Silver Medallist, Not Ready Yet, Pipeline, Offer Declined).
7. Build 'Add Candidate' form dialog with manual tag entry.
8. Implement 'Follow Up' button logic: opens a dialog/drawer simulating an AI-generated message, with a 'Send Email' button that triggers a mailto: link.
9. Include Warmth Indicators (colored dots or bars) on candidate cards.
10. Ensure GDPR consent state is visible on candidates or in the Add Candidate form.
11. Build a 'Daily Digest' view summarizing candidates needing follow-up.
12. Use the exact media URLs provided in this file. Do not use generic placeholders.
